HR/Docs
Getting StartedFeaturesAPIБългарски

Prerequisites

Before configuring the Odoo integration, ensure you have:

  • Odoo 18 Community or Enterprise edition running and accessible over HTTP
  • A dedicated Odoo database for the HR platform
  • An Odoo user account with administrative access to the HR modules
  • PostgreSQL 17 instance for Odoo (separate from the application database which uses PostgreSQL 16)

Environment Variables

The Go API requires the following environment variables to connect to Odoo:

These variables are typically set in the deploy/podman-compose.override.yml file for local development or through your deployment platform's secret management for production.

Database Configuration

Odoo requires its own PostgreSQL instance. The Podman Compose configuration includes a dedicated odoo-db service running PostgreSQL 17, separate from the api-db service running PostgreSQL 16 for the application database.

Verifying the Connection

After configuring the environment variables, start the API server and check the health endpoint:

The response includes an odoo field indicating the connection status. If the connection fails, check that the Odoo instance is reachable from the API container and that the credentials are correct.

Troubleshooting

  • Session expired — The API automatically re-authenticates when Odoo returns an AccessDenied error, with a single retry to prevent infinite loops.
  • Slow responses — Check the cache hit rate in the API logs. Cold cache on first startup is expected; subsequent requests should be served from L1/L2 cache.
  • Circuit breaker open — After five consecutive failures, the circuit breaker opens. The API will serve stale cache data (up to 30 minutes old) until the circuit resets.
